sections.paragraph: Psa 129:7, and חֹצֶן Isai. 49:22 Neh 5:13, m., the bosom of garments in which any thing is carried. Arabic حِضْنُ, Eth. ሕፅን፡ id., whence denom. verb حضن to carry in the bosom. [In Thes. חֵצֶן arm, forearm; so called from strength (root חָצַן);-חֹצֶן id., also bosom where any thing is carried.]
